createComment_4104bef389.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
What Failed: All 15 tests in AppControllerCreateCommentTest failed due to Mockito setup errors, not application logic.
Where: AppControllerCreateCommentTest.java (e.g., lines 339, 273, 314).
Why: doNothing() was incorrectly used on non-void methods in mock objects; Mockito only supports doNothing() for void methods.
Investigate: Review test setups where doNothing() is used. Replace with appropriate stubbing for non-void return types (e.g., use when().thenReturn()).,

Error Analysis:
What Failed: Test expected NullPointerException, but got NumberFormatException when deleting user with null ID.  
Where: UserAccountControllerDeleteUserByIdTest.testDeleteUserWithNullId (line 119), triggered in UserAccountController.deleteUserById (line 34).

Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Mockito's doNothing() was used on a non-void method, causing test failures in UserAccountControllerUpdateInfoUserByTest.
* Where: UserAccountControllerUpdateInfoUserByTest.java (lines 232, 253, 356).
* Why: doNothing() is valid only for void methods; use when(mock.method()).thenReturn(...) for non-void.
* Investigate: Review Mockito mock configurations; update mocks for non-void methods using thenReturn(), thenThrow(), or appropriate stubbing instead of doNothing().,

newToken_275af2b2e1.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
What Failed: JWT token generation and related unit tests failed due to missing dependencies and invalid/empty JWT secret keys.

Where: com.medeiros.SPRINGProject.Security.JwtUtilNewTokenTest (e.g., testGenerateTokenForUserCredentialsUsernameWithSpecialCharacters, testGenerateTokenWithCorrectIssuedAtAndExpiration).

Why: Root causes include missing jjwt-impl.jar for Serializer, null/weak jwtSecret values (≤256 bits), and improper key setup, leading to NullPointerException and WeakKeyException.

Investigate: Verify jjwt-impl.jar is present in classpath, ensure jwtSecret is initialized and securely generated (≥256 bits), and update unit test setup for valid secret values before token generation.,

getUserName_e910087e84.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: JWT utility tests failed due to missing implementation for Serializer/Deserializer interfaces.
* Where: com.medeiros.SPRINGProject.Security.JwtUtilGetUserNameTest (e.g., testValidJwtTokenReturnsUsername).
* Why: The jjwt-impl.jar (or equivalent) is not present in the classpath, preventing the ServiceLoader from locating necessary JWT components.
* Investigate: Verify your build (Maven/Gradle) dependencies include jjwt-impl.jar and ensure it is loaded at runtime and for test execution.,

Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
What Failed: Serialization of MusicModel during test execution.  
Where: MusicModelGetNumberOfLovesTest.testGetNumberOfLovesAfterSerialization (line 106).  
Why: MusicModel does not implement java.io.Serializable, causing NotSerializableException.  
Investigate: Add implements Serializable to MusicModel and verify any non-serializable fields.,
